complexity_reasons: Aggregation/grouping/joins: monthly communication totals, department budget aggregation
Two or more business rules: duplicate, split, over-standard, overdue, over-budget (5 rules)
Thresholds/dates/exemptions: 60-day window, 7-day split window, per-capita entertainment, year-end extension

policy_questions.condition: Same invoice reimbursed more than once
Same employee, same expense_type, within 7 days, combined amount reaches higher approval level per 03_authorization_management.md
Reimburse_date - expense_date > 60 days; year-end expenses (Dec) get 15-day extension from Dec 31

data_questions: Identify all records sharing same invoice_no
For each employee+expense_type, find records within 7-day windows and check combined approval levels
Check each record against its applicable standard by expense_type
Compute reimburse_delay = reimburse_date - expense_date for each record
Sum department totals and compare to annual budgets
Check monthly communication totals per employee

execution_steps.action: Launch data_analyst for comprehensive batch analysis

subagent_plan.task: Perform comprehensive batch expense analysis across all 21 records for 5 rules: duplicate (same invoice), split (same employee+type within 7 days, combined reaching higher AR level), over-standard (by expense type against policy standards), overdue (>60 days, with year-end extension), over-budget (department total vs annual budget). Use SQLite and Python for aggregation, date computation, and threshold checks. Save detailed analysis to work/subagents/data_analyst/.

stopping_conditions: All 5 rules fully checked against all 21 records
